DISCOVERY 302, RE: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RENEW. SEE MINI MINUTES FOR ADDITIONAL INFORMATION. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: BARBARA ZUNIGA. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/BZ)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-06-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF SEYED MIRFALLAHI , AN INDIVIDUAL Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. 1. Court notes in its reply Plaintiff's counsel did not address the failure to comply with CRC 3.1345. 2. Defendant's point is well taken. 3. Motion is denied without prejudice to renew.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Barbara Zuniga. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/BZ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Set For Trial On May-04-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
